content.en:
The Red Dragon Dao Ancestor was the master of the Red Dragon Dojo, and he was also a Dao Ancestor in the Domain Realm, a Dao Ancestor in another even more vast chaotic region.

Ye Tian originally thought that all the creatures on the battlefield ruins had fallen, but he never expected that the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor was still alive.

This news is too shocking, and it is not a trivial matter, it represents a signal, that is, there must be other domain powerhouses hidden or sleeping in the battlefield ruins or the ruins of the Quasi-Dao Realm.

Lanyue Dao Ancestor and the other Four Great Dao Ancestors' faces also changed slightly, and the news revealed by Jiong was too shocking.

Although these Dao Ancestors had speculated before that the Domain Boundary Fragments would pass through the forbidden area, whether there would still be people alive, many True Monarchs thought that no one was alive, because the forbidden area was too terrifying, and the top Dao Ancestors would not be able to pass through the forbidden area, and once they went deep into the forbidden area, they would also fall.

Therefore, even if the creatures on the Domain Fragment were still alive at the beginning, they would definitely be wiped out by the power of the forbidden area when they passed through the forbidden area, and it was unlikely that they would still be alive.

But now, the spirit of the Red Dragon Dojo revealed that the master of the dojo, the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor, was still alive.

"Hmph, you are deliberately deceiving us, the fragments of the domain boundary pass through the forbidden area, any living creature will be wiped out by the power of the forbidden area, and the Dao Ancestor can't bear it, how can there be any life?"

Lanyue Dao Ancestor said coldly.

"Forbidden Zone?" Jiong was stunned for a moment, but quickly understood what the forbidden area was talking about, "The forbidden area you are talking about should refer to the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the forbidden area should be your side, but in fact, the area shrouded in endless darkness is called the Dark Forbidden Domain, if the Dao Ancestors do not have a way to deal with it, they will lose their way when they enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they will also be invaded by the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the soul will be obliterated." However, our Divine Heaven Realm has a method against the Dark Forbidden Domain, although we can't completely contend with it, but the Dao Ancestors are sure that they will spend a long time in the Dark Forbidden Domain, so it is not difficult to pass through the Dark Forbidden Domain with the fragments of the Domain Realm!"

"What is the place of the Divine Heaven Realm?"

Tumen Dao Ancestor asked curiously.

Jiong seemed to want to delay time, so he had to answer all questions, but as the powerhouses of this realm explored the battlefield ruins, they would definitely know about the situation in the Shentian Realm, so he said it now just to let the powerhouses here know about the Shentian Realm in advance.

Jiong explained: "No one knows how big the chaos is, I only know that the chaos is divided into blocks, and there are dark forbidden domains between the realms, so it is difficult for the powerhouses of one realm to break through the blockade of the dark forbidden realm to other realms. The Divine Heaven Realm is the name of the realm where I am located, and it is an incomparably vast realm, with countless powerhouses, and there is even more than one domain boundary! Some people speculate that the realm is a chaotic area carved out in the dark forbidden realm, and some people speculate that the realm is an area formed by the inner world after the fall of some powerful people who are unimaginably strong! There are strong and weak realms, the Divine Heaven Realm is very strong, and the rules are also very strong, and the rules of your realm are very weak, far inferior to the Divine Heaven Realm, I think the strongest person in your realm should only be the strongest Dao Ancestor!"

"Could it be that your Divine Heaven Realm has a powerhouse above the Dao Ancestor?"

Lanyue Daozu couldn't help but ask.

The other three Dao Ancestors were also very excited, waiting for Jiong's answer one by one.

They also wanted to know about this problem, although they knew from the domain realm ruins that there were stronger people above the Dao Ancestor, but they didn't know anything about that level, so they were very curious and eager.

Jiong replied: "Dao Ancestor above the Domain Ancestor, in the Divine Heaven Realm, the Domain Ancestor is a great existence high above, even my master Red Dragon Dao Ancestor has never seen the Domain Ancestor, the Domain Ancestor can open up the Domain Realm and become the Lord of the Domain Realm, and the Domain Realm where I am has a Domain Ancestor, but unfortunately an accident, the Domain Ancestor died in battle, and the Domain Boundary was shattered, otherwise this Domain Boundary Fragment would not fall into your Realm!"

"Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian and the Four Great Dao Ancestors also yearn for this realm very much, if they become a Domain Ancestor in their realm, they will definitely become the strongest, above the other Dao Ancestors, and dominate everything.

"How do I become a domain ancestor?"

Tumen Daozu said urgently.

There was a trace of disdain in his eyes, and he seemed to want to say: Just because you also want to become a domain ancestor?

Indeed, in such a powerful realm as the Divine Heaven Realm, countless Dao Ancestors have no way to break the shackles and become a Domain Ancestor, just a Tumen Dao Ancestor is just an ordinary Dao Ancestor, how can he be qualified to become a Dao Ancestor!

Moreover, Jiong still didn't say a little.

That is, the Dao Ancestor who uses the ancestral monument to merge with the Dao has no hope of becoming a domain ancestor, and the ancestral stele merge is the most rubbish way to merge the way, and it completely imprisons his own potential.

But he wouldn't reveal it, because he didn't have to.

"How to become a domain ancestor, I don't know, but I heard the master mention that the domain ancestors of the Divine Heaven Realm have all entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, and perhaps becoming a domain ancestor is related to the Dark Forbidden Domain. Jiong explained.

"Dark Forbidden Realm!"

The Four Great Dao Ancestors have changed color, this is a forbidden area, they don't dare to enter the Dark Forbidden Domain at all, if the top True Ancestors don't go deep into the Dark Forbidden Domain, they will still have their lives back, but once they ordinary Dao Ancestors enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, they will basically die for a lifetime.

"Don't resist your little dojo spirit, just take out all the treasures in the dojo!"

Lanyue Daozu ordered.

"Everyone, it's good enough that I've answered so many of your questions! Do you really want to be an enemy of my master, the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor? Although my master is only a Dao Ancestor in the early stage of Merger, the combat power of the Dao Ancestor of the Divine Heaven Realm is definitely stronger than that of the Dao Ancestor of your realm, and with the combat power of my master, the four of you are not his opponent together!" Jiong said coldly.

"With all that, where is your master now?"

Mengyue Dao Ancestor Dao.

"My master is ......," Jiong was about to say, but quickly reacted, "Hmph, you want to trick me, but I can tell you that it won't be long before my master wakes up." In addition, there are still a group of sleeping Dao Ancestors left in the domain realm, once they wake up, your weak realm will definitely be finished!"

The four Lanyue Dao Ancestors also looked solemn when they listened to Jiong's words.

Maybe the Red Dragon Dao Ancestor is not strong, but the other Dao Ancestors of the Domain Boundary Fragment must have very powerful existences, in case there is a Domain Realm Dao Ancestor who is even stronger than the strongest Dao Ancestor in their realm, then their realm is indeed dangerous.

However, this made them even more eager to get the treasures of this dojo, maybe they could use this opportunity to make their strength go further, otherwise how would they survive the next crisis?

"Up!"

The four of Lanyue Dao Ancestors made a move.

Rumble!!!!

The four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations shot out in unison, instantly tearing apart Jiong's spirit body.

Of course, this didn't kill Jiong, it just destroyed a body that Jiong condensed with the power of the dojo, and if the dojo was not destroyed, Jiong could not be destroyed, which was also one of the abilities of the spirit of the dojo.

And when the Four Great Dao Ancestors incarnated to attack the dojo, one after another figures in the Red Dragon Pool came out of the pool.

What is different from usual is that the eyes of these true monarchs are all blood-red, all of them are very weird, exuding a completely different aura from before, but their strength has been greatly improved, as if they have been reborn.
